name: Forest Fettucine with Morels and Breast of Pheasant
recipeIngredient: Pheasant breasts (from 3 lb pheasants, boned, skinned & halved)
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Prepare the fettuccine dough by combining semolina flour with eggs and yolks. Process until a smooth ball forms. Knead on a floured surface, then pat into a thick cylinder, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
Roll out the dough using a pasta machine or by hand, forming it onto a tray dusted with semolina. Cover with a towel until ready to cook.
Prepare the morel cream sauce by soaking mushrooms in warm water for 5 minutes (fresh can be used), then draining and cutting into small pieces. Sauté in butter until tender, add cream, and simmer until thickened. Season with salt, white pepper, and nutmeg.
Heat fiddlehead ferns or asparagus tips in butter until just heated through.
Brown pheasant breasts in butter for 5 minutes, then finish cooking until lightly browned and barely done. Let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Boil the noodles in salted water until tender, drain thoroughly, and toss with most of the sauce. Arrange on plates, top with pheasant slices, and garnish with remaining sauce and greens.
